def negative_python_perf_layer_caching_cache_key_uses_json_dumps_in_hot_path():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_caching_cache_key_uses_json_dumps_in_hot_path"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Caching. Flag cache keys built with json.dumps in hot paths when tuple or stable string keys would work."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
